question_text: Let WB and WT be two set associative cache organizations that use LRU algorithm for

options.C: ache block replacement. WB is a write back cache and WT is a write through cache. Which of the following statements is/are FALSE?
options.A: Each cache block in WB and WT has a dirty bit.
options.B: Every write hit in WB leads to a data transfer from cache to main memory.
options.D: A read miss in WB will never lead to eviction of a dirty block from WB.
